---
title: "Data transformation with dplyr"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/dplyr.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/dplyr.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/dplyr.pdf){download="dplyr.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to [Task 1: Filter, select, and mutate](tasks/dplyr-task-1.qmd) and [Task 2: Summarize & visualize](tasks/dplyr-task-2.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [dplyr cheatsheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/data-transformation.pdf){target="_blank"}
